items.description:
Used by the Russian MVD units in the early 2000s.

Matching clothing can be found here:
https://www.roblox.com/groups/34923647/Odema-Clothing-Factory#!/about

More variants:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=ANA-VV1&Category=1&CreatorName=Red%27s+Surplus+Store&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

"A light flashes in the dark,
Brothers, let's relax in silence.
I can hear your voice - painfully familiar to me
Warm up some tea, let's drive the tiredness
Today was a hard day.
We took the hill, the Black Wolf whines away."

Special thanks to comrade Kazachenko for modelling this.
